title: Update module github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22 to v22.6.0 - abandoned
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd) | `v22.5.0` -> `v22.6.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcoreos%2fgo-systemd%2fv22/v22.6.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcoreos%2fgo-systemd%2fv22/v22.5.0/v22.6.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

> [!WARNING]
> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the Dependency Dashboard for more information.

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>coreos/go-systemd (github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22)</summary>

### [`v22.6.0`](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/releases/tag/v22.6.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/compare/v22.5.0...v22.6.0)

This release bumps Go requirement to 1.23, modernizes code, improves CI
and documentation, fixes a few bugs, and adds a new dbus method.

#### What's Changed

- workflows: update Linux distro versions; update actions; add Go 1.20 by [@​bgilbert](https://redirect.github.com/bgilbert) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/418](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/418)
- Sync repo templates ⚙ by [@​coreosbot-releng](https://redirect.github.com/coreosbot-releng) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/422](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/422)
- build(deps): bump github.com/godbus/dbus/v5 from 5.0.4 to 5.1.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/423](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/423)3
- journal: fix return types inside C wrapper functions by [@​darxriggs](https://redirect.github.com/darxriggs) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/419](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/419)
- dlopen: make error handling thread safe by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/431](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/431)
- Sync repo templates ⚙ by [@​coreosbot-releng](https://redirect.github.com/coreosbot-releng) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/450](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/450)
- Modernize and fix CI by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/459](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/459)
- dbus: add AttachProcessesToUnit by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/458](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/458)
- dbus: Add a comment about result channel behaviour by [@​NotSoFancyName](https://redirect.github.com/NotSoFancyName) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/463](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/463)
- Bump go to 1.23, fix tests, add more images by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/464](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/464)
- Modernize sources, add golangci-lint by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/466](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/466)
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/467](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/467)7
- ci: test go 1.25 by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/468](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/468)
- README: bump minimal Go version by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/470](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/470)
- import1: test fixes by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/469](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/469)

#### New Contributors

- [@​coreosbot-releng](https://redirect.github.com/coreosbot-releng) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/422](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/422)
- [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] made their first contribution in[https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/423](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/423)3
- [@​darxriggs](https://redirect.github.com/darxriggs) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/419](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/419)
- [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/431](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/431)
- [@​NotSoFancyName](https://redirect.github.com/NotSoFancyName) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/463](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/463)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/compare/v22.5.0...v22.6.0

</details>
